 (Advanced)

title: Software Architect
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Software Architect / Solutions Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will be responsible for
 **defining and overseeing the overall system architecture** 
 for our AI-powered platform. You will collaborate with engineering teams, product managers, and stakeholders to design
 **scalable, secure, and high-performing solutions** 
 that align with business objectives.
   

  

 You will play a key role in shaping our
 **technology strategy, evaluating new tools and frameworks, and ensuring best practices** 
 in software design, cloud infrastructure, and system integration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain the overall architecture and system design for scalable and efficient software solutions.
* Provide technical leadership to engineering teams, guiding them in best practices for architecture, coding, and system scalability.
* Design and document high-level system diagrams, data flows, and API structures.
* Evaluate and recommend technologies, frameworks, and cloud services to optimize performance, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and security in all architectural decisions.
* Oversee system integrations, including microservices, APIs, and third-party services.
* Work closely with DevOps and SRE teams to ensure smooth deployment and operational reliability.
* Establish coding and architecture standards, ensuring maintainability and scalability of codebases.
* Identify and mitigate technical risks, ensuring system resilience and future scalability.
* Conduct architecture reviews and performance audits to continuously improve system efficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in software development and architecture.
* Strong expertise in system design, cloud computing, and microservices architecture.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) and cloud-native architectures.
* Proficiency in backend technologies (e.g., Node.js, Python, Java, .NET) and experience with modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue).
* Knowledge of databases (SQL and NoSQL), caching strategies, and data pipelines.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, API design, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Strong understanding of security best practices, identity management, and encryption techniques.
* Ability to evaluate trade-offs in architectural decisions, balancing scalability, cost, and complexity.
* Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex architectural concepts to technical and non-technical stakeholders.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Förvaltaren söker senior IT-drifttekniker
description:
*Vill du ha en nyckelroll i att hålla en hel verksamhet igång – både tekniskt och säkert? Vi söker en erfaren IT-drifttekniker som vill göra skillnad! Hos oss får du en central roll i att säkerställa en trygg och välfungerande IT-miljö, samtidigt som du driver tekniska förbättringar och utveckling. Här väntar en bred roll med stort ansvar och möjlighet att påverka framtidens lösningar.*




***Urval och intervjuer påbörjas i augusti. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!***




****Om rollen****




 Som IT-drifttekniker hos Förvaltaren har du en central roll i att säkerställa stabil och säker drift av IT-plattformen. Du arbetar med installation, felsökning, underhåll och vidareutveckling av den tekniska miljön och ansvarar särskilt för driften av vissa affärskritiska OnPrem-system kopplade till fastighetsverksamheten. I rollen fungerar du som teknisk expert och kontaktperson vid större förändringar, projekt och incidenter. Du har även en samordnande funktion, där du leder och stödjer tekniska kollegor i det dagliga arbetet och i gemensamma initiativ.
   

  





 Du arbetar med avancerad felsökning och problemlösning i både klient- och servermiljöer samt ger stöd i 2nd och 3rd line-support. I rollen tar du fram lösningar på tekniska utmaningar, driver egna projekt och bidrar till att utveckla rutiner, riktlinjer och dokumentation. Du ställer krav och följer upp leveranser från externa leverantörer samt säkerställer att dessa uppfyller både tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga behov. Arbetat innebär också att du håller dig uppdaterad inom teknikområdet, uppmärksammar nya möjligheter och säkerhetsrisker samt föreslår förbättringar av Förvaltarens IT-miljö.
   

  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Administrera och optimera Förvaltarens serverplattform både molntjänst och on-prem
* Uppgradera och serva Förvaltarens driftsmiljö
* Genomföra och sköta nyinstallationer i Förvaltarens driftsmiljö
* Avancerad felsökning och problemlösning på klient och servernivå
* Säkerställa hög IT-säkerhet och efterlevnad av regelverk såsom GDPR och NIS2
* Arbeta med riskanalyser och definiera tekniska krav vid nya system och upphandlingar, samt säkerställa tekniska skyddsåtgärder för personuppgifter



****Vi söker dig****




 Vi söker dig som har ett stort tekniskt intresse och flera års erfarenhet av IT-drift och infrastruktur. Du är van att arbeta både operativt och strategiskt, tar ansvar för dina leveranser och trivs i en roll där du får kombinera problemlösning med utvecklingsarbete.
   

  





**Vi ser att du har:** 



* Minst fem års erfarenhet från en liknande roll inom IT-drift eller infrastruktur.
* God kompetens inom Microsofts ekosystem, exempelvis Azure, M 365, AD och Teams.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i hybrida IT-miljöer
* Praktisk erfarenhet av installation, drift, underhåll och felsökning av Windows klient- och servermiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av IT-säkerhetsarbete och regelefterlevnad inom exempelvis GDPR och NIS2.
* Kunskaper inom nätverk, brandväggar och kommunikationsprotokoll såsom TCP/IP och DNS.
* Kunskaper i PowerShell.
* Erfarenhet av patchhantering i Windowsmiljöer, exempelvis Intune eller Heimdal.
* Erfarenhet av virtualiserade miljöer baserade på VMware vSphere.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med SQL



 Det är meriterande om du har kunskap om Biztalk, skrivare, Unifi och Fortigate. Vidareutbildning, alternativt certifieringar inom Microsofts produktportfölj ITIL, PM3 eller inom agilt arbetssätt, är också meriterande.
   

  





****Personliga egenskaper****




 Som person är du ansvarstagande, lösningsorienterad och trivs med att driva arbetet framåt. Du arbetar strukturerat, tar ägarskap för dina uppgifter och uppskattar samtidigt samarbetet med andra för att nå gemensamma mål.
   

  





 Du är nyfiken och har en vilja att utvecklas. Med ditt analytiska förhållningssätt har du lätt för att se samband, identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter och hitta hållbara lösningar. Du arbetar noggrant, har en hög kvalitetsmedvetenhet och ett naturligt säkerhetstänk.
   

  





 Rollen innebär många kontaktytor, vilket ställer krav på god kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga. Du är lyhörd, skapar förtroendefulla relationer och känner dig trygg i att ta initiativ och anpassa din kommunikation efter situation och målgrupp.
   

  





 Känner du igen dig i våra värderingar – att vi gillar människor, lyssnar nyfiket, vågar utmana och står för det vi säger och gör – då kan Förvaltaren vara rätt plats för dig.
   

  





****Vårt erbjudande****




 För oss är det viktigt att kunna kombinera karriär med ett privatliv där det finns utrymme för dina prioriteringar. Vi erbjuder därför en flexibel arbetsvardag och under sommarhalvåret erbjuder vi en uppskattad arbetstidsförkortning, där fredagarna avslutas redan vid lunchtid. På Förvaltaren blir du en del av en arbetsgemenskap med sunda värderingar och en mångfald av medarbetare som tillsammans skapar attraktiva och trygga bostadsområden där människor trivs och mår bra. Att vi har stolta, nöjda och engagerade medarbetare som gärna rekommenderar Förvaltaren som arbetsgivare – det visar vår medarbetarundersökning år efter år. Vi har också uppskattade ledare och ett ledarskapsindex som ligger långt över Sverigesnittet.
   

  





****Ansökan****




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid. Du söker tjänsten genom att skicka CV och personligt brev. Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vårt rekryteringssystem.
   

  





**Vänligen observera att urval och intervjuer påbörjas i början/mitten av augusti.**




 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Digitaliseringschef Abraham Oussi på abraham.oussi@forvaltaren.se 
   

  





**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**




  
   

  





****Fastighets AB Förvaltaren****




 Sundbybergs allmännyttiga bostadsbolag har sedan starten 1947 varit med att bygga och utveckla det moderna Sundbyberg. Med våra 140 medarbetare äger, utvecklar och förvaltar vi hyresrätter och lokaler. Vi bidrar till ett växande Sundbyberg och en levande och hållbar stad.
   

  





 För att vi ska vara långsiktigt framgångsrika navigerar vi och följer upp verksamheten utifrån fem områden; Attraktiva bostadsområden, Trygghet och trivsel, Klimat- och resurseffektiv verksamhet, Attraktiv arbetsplats samt Ekonomiskt ansvar. Förvaltaren har stort fokus på hållbarhet och är miljöcertifierat enligt ISO 14 001.

title: CLUSTER NORTH DIGITAL / CYBER SECURITY OFFICER - M/F
description:
**Securitas Group** 




  





 Strongly united by the purpose “We help make your world a safer place”, Securitas successfully integrates technology, people, and knowledge to offer protective services to clients all over the world. Securitas offers security services by combining expertise in on-site, mobile and remote guarding with electronic security and experience in fire and safety. The group has 322,000 employees in 44 markets worldwide.
 



  





 Securitas vision is to become the Intelligent Protective Services Partner through being client centric, data driven, and people focused. Our protective services help make your world a safer place.
 



  





  





 At Securitas,
 **Digital Security (Cyber Security)** 
 is focused on protecting our systems, applications, data, and services while enabling secure and reliable business operations.
 



 We ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information across all countries, with a strong emphasis on technical controls, application security, risk-based decision-making, and operational execution.
 



  





 All countries within our scope are either certified against ISO/IEC 27001 or actively implementing it, ensuring a consistent and structured approach to information security management across the organisation.
 



  





 Our approach focuses on:
 



  




* Resilience – maintaining service availability during and after incidents
* Control – continuous visibility and management of the security posture across infrastructure and applications
* Trust – delivering secure, reliable, and compliant services
* Alignment – integrating security into business, IT, and application development processes
* Integration – embedding security into platforms, infrastructure, and applications by design



  





 In practice, this includes:
 



  




* Implementing and maintaining core security controls (IAM, endpoint protection, logging/monitoring, vulnerability and patch management, and application security controls)
* Establishing clear governance, accountability, and control frameworks across infrastructure and applications
* Ensuring security is integrated into projects, application lifecycle (SDLC), infrastructure, and supplier lifecycle
* Maintaining continuous monitoring and visibility of threats, vulnerabilities, and control effectiveness across systems and applications
* Identifying and protecting critical assets, business-critical services, and key applications



  





  





**Your Role – Cluster Digital Security Officer (Cluster North)** 




  





 As a Cluster Digital Security Officer, you will support the technical execution, coordination, and oversight of Digital Security across Cluster North (Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, the UK, and Ireland), while also contributing to Group/ Division-level security priorities.
 



 This is a hands-on, operational role, delivered as part of a wider Digital Security organization. You will work closely with different Division/Group IT teams, Digital Security Operations, Digital Security, and Country IT teams, operating in a collaborative, multi-country and multi-layer (Cluster–Division–Group) environment.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Security Coordination & Team Collaboration (Cluster & Division)** 




  




* Coordinate Digital Security activities across the Cluster and support execution of the security roadmap aligned with Division priorities, including application security initiatives
* Ensure consistent implementation of security controls, baselines, and services across infrastructure and applications
* Work closely with GITS, Application teams, Domain and other IT teams to ensure alignment and effective execution
* Contribute actively to the Digital Security community, including sharing practices related to application and platform security
* Provide regular, transparent, and data-driven reporting on risk posture, control effectiveness, and remediation progress



  





**Technical Security Oversight (Infrastructure & Applications)** 




  




* Monitor and assess the security posture of platforms, infrastructure, and applications (on-prem and cloud)
* Oversee key control areas including vulnerability management, patching, identity and access management, endpoint security, and application security
* Support secure practices across the application lifecycle (SDLC), including awareness of secure design and common vulnerabilities (e.g. OWASP Top 10)
* Ensure effective logging, monitoring, and incident detection capabilities are in place across infrastructure and applications
* Track and assess third-party and supplier risks, including risks related to applications and integrations



  





**Risk, Compliance & Assurance** 




  




* Identify and track gaps against security policies, standards, and mandates, including application security requirements
* Support/execute risk assessments, internal and external audits, and customer assurance activities across Cluster environments
* Drive and follow up on risk remediation plans, ensuring clear ownership and execution across technical teams



  





**Securitas Alarm Monitoring Centers (SOC) Security** 




  





 In addition to Cluster responsibilities, you will contribute to Division-level security of Securitas Alarm Monitoring Centers (SOCs) supporting the Domain Digital Security Officer SOC and RVS, which are among the most critical environments within Securitas.
 



  





 This includes:
 



  




* Supporting and overseeing the security posture of SOC environments, including underlying infrastructure and supporting applications
* Ensuring implementation of enhanced technical controls (e.g. network segmentation, strong access control, privileged access management, monitoring, and secure application access)
* Monitoring the availability, integrity, and protection of SOC systems, applications, and data flows
* Supporting incident detection, response readiness, and recovery capabilities for SOC-related platforms and applications
* Working closely with Infrastructure, Application, SOC and other IT teams to reduce attack surface and strengthen resilience of SOC environments



  





  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 




  





 We are looking for a candidate who combines technical understanding across infrastructure and applications, structured execution, and strong collaboration skills.
 



  





**Education** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related field



  





**Certifications (mandatory)** 




  




* CISSP or CISM or equivalent



  





**Experience & Knowledge** 




  




* 5–7 years of experience in Cyber Security, Information Security or Application Security
* Minimum of 2 years of experience in IT operations
* Good understanding of security domains (IAM, endpoint security, vulnerability management, logging/monitoring, network security, and application security)
* Solid understanding of application security principles, including secure development practices, common vulnerabilities (e.g. OWASP Top 10), and risks in application architecture and integrations
* Good understanding of ISO 27001 standard
* Experience with risk management, audits, or compliance activities
* Understanding of infrastructure environments (networks, servers, cloud platforms) and their interaction with applications



  





**Technical & Analytical Skills** 




  




* Ability to assess security posture across infrastructure and applications and identify control gaps
* Comfortable working with security metrics, reports, and risk data
* Understanding of incident detection and response processes, including those impacting applications
* Ability to translate security requirements into practical and implementable actions across infrastructure and application teams



  





**Ways of Working** 




  




* Strong team player, comfortable working across countries and functions
* Able to coordinate activities and drive follow-up without direct authority
* Structured, hands-on, and execution-focused mindset
* Clear communicator, able to engage both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Proactive, with a focus on practical problem-solving and continuous improvement



  





  





**Your Impact** 




 You will play a key role in ensuring that Digital Security is not only defined, but implemented, measurable, and effective across both infrastructure and applications—through strong collaboration, technical oversight, and shared responsibility across Cluster, Division, and Group teams.
 



  





  





**What we offer:** 




  





 At Securitas, we are committed to doing the right thing—and doing it well—for both our customers and our employees. Our employees come from diverse backgrounds, bringing a wide range of talents, perspectives, and experiences. We strive for inclusive representation across the company and are committed to equal pay, safe working conditions, gender balance, and an inclusive environment that fosters growth, skill development, and career opportunities.
 



  





  





**If this resonates with you, don’t wait - apply today!**

title: Pre-Sales Engineer SaaS Industry (Technical Swedish Speaker)
description:
Since 2020, Semine has been building AI-driven technology designed to eliminate the repetitive, manual tasks that slow down accounting teams. By automating accounts payable processes and reducing administrative burden, Semine empowers finance professionals to focus on analysis, strategy, and value creation rather than data entry.
 



  





 In July 2025, Semine joined forces with Rydoo and is now a Rydoo company. Together, we are advancing a shared vision: simplifying financial operations through intelligent automation. By combining Semine’s AI expertise in accounts payable with Rydoo’s trusted expense management platform - used by more than one million users worldwide - we are creating a comprehensive, AI-powered solution that streamlines both expenses and payables in one seamless ecosystem.
 



  





 As a global team of more than 200 professionals, we believe technology should make complex processes simpler and more efficient. If you’re driven to build impactful solutions and shape the future of financial automation, you’ll fit right in.
 



  





**Rydoo / Semine in a snapshot** 



* Ambitious international team
* 33 nationalities speaking over 15 languages
* 240+ employees across multiple countries
* Easy-to-use spend management app available on iPhone and Android
* Supporting over 10,000+ clients and 1 million+ users worldwide
* 4.6 employer score on Glassdoor
* Hybrid work policy



  





**The Role** 




 As a Pre-Sales Engineer, you will act as the link between technology and business, helping prospects understand how Semine’s AI-powered finance automation platform can solve real operational challenges and drive growth. Working closely with Sales Executives across the Nordics, you will design and deliver tailored product demonstrations, showcase Semine’s value in measurable business terms, and clearly communicate how the platform integrates with ERP systems and other financial tools. By translating complex technical concepts into simple, visual, and customer-focused solutions, you will play a key role in supporting the sales process and enabling successful customer outcomes.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Deliver engaging and tailored product demonstrations that showcase Semine’s capabilities.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor in customer dialogues and workshops.
* Collaborate with Sales Executives to build solution proposals that align with client needs and ERP environments.
* Answer technical and functional questions with clarity and confidence.
* Support pre-sales activities from qualification to closing, ensuring smooth handover to delivery.
* Represent Semine in client meetings, webinars, and industry events.



  





**Requirements** 



* Experience in pre-sales, solution consulting, or technical sales support within SaaS or ERP.
* Strong understanding of finance, accounting, or ERP workflows.
* Proven ability to communicate complex ideas clearly to both business and technical audiences.
* Excellent presentation skills, proactive mindset, and adaptability.
* Fluent in Swedish and English (Finnish is a big plus)



  





 To succeed in this role, you should be ambitious, proactive, and thrive in a fast-paced growth environment. You are motivated by solving client problems, balancing technical accuracy with commercial goals, and contributing directly to Semine’s success.
 



  





**If you believe you’re a great fit and are excited to contribute to this journey, don’t hesitate to apply and help us take our growth to the next level.** 




  





**Benefits** 




 Next to our amazing team, informal & international company culture and our mission to become the number 1 spend and invoice management platform in Europe, we offer some nice benefits that make working at Rydoo / Semine even more fun:
 


* A competitive package, including salary and benefits
* Competitive bonus structure
* Tailored onboarding programs
* Solid pension and insurance packages
* A social and inclusive work environment
* Modern office facilities



  





**Check us out** 




 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/rydoo
 



 Glassdoor: http://bit.ly/2UujjWJ
 



 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rydoo/
 



 YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTZYj7vm\_ZcsGFL18jWHt\_A
 



 Inside Rydoo Blog: https://www.rydoo.com/inside-rydoo/

title: Integration Subpractice Leader
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Our Cloud & Custom Applications teams focuses on developing tailored cloud solutions, integrating IT systems, and driving business transformation, delivering business-critical results with quality and speed, powered by Generative AI. Capgemini’s Integration & API capability helps clients connect their digital core; applications, data, partners, and platforms, securely and at scale. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world!
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are now looking for an Integration Subpractice Leader to join the leadership team of our Integration business line in Sweden. You will be essential in driving the growth of our Integration business and practice capacity. You will be the people manager for team managers across Stockholm, Göteborg, Helsingborg and Malmö. In your role you will collaborate with our Head of Integrations & APIs to, for example, co-shape our strategy. You will ensure progress in execution of practice growth in and alignment to market demands. As an expert in your field you will be a visible ambassador for our integration and API offerings, and a client-facing leader. You are strong in architecture and will lead and develop our delivery teams, while also contributing part-time in billable engagements.
   

  

**Lead & grow the Integration Subpractice in Sweden**
* Lead, coach and develop team managers across multiple locations; set direction, priorities, and execution cadence.
* Drive capability and talent planning: hiring, onboarding, upskilling/certifications, and building communities of practice.
* Establish a clear operating rhythm across sites (delivery governance, staffing strategy, quality gates, and performance follow-up).
* Collaborate with Head of Integrations and APIs in strategy setting and aligning development of the subpractice.
* Take a leading role in transforming Capgemini’s Integration & API capability for the AI Agentic era, where integrations are no longer only system-to-system, but agent-to-agent, agent-to-system, and event-driven by AI.


**Ambassador & market maker for Integration and APIs**
* Act as a visible spokesperson for Integration & API: promote the offering internally (cross-business collaboration) and externally (events, client briefings, thought leadership content).
* Work closely with Capgemini’s partner representatives to develop partnerships and co-selling motions; strengthen ecosystem collaboration.


**Build pipeline through proactive presales & bids**
* Collaborate closely with the Integration CoE in creating pipeline via proactive client engagement and structured presales.
* Contribute with the integration perspective into bids: solution shaping, estimations, staffing approach, delivery model, risk management and value proposition.


**Client-facing advisory and delivery leadership**
* Engage confidently with clients and senior stakeholders, present integration strategies, architectures, and roadmaps with executive presence.
* Lead billable deliveries part-time, guide delivery teams to outcomes with strong governance and predictable execution.
* Shape client services in line with Head of Integration and APIs’ visions such as integration assessment & strategy, integration foundation/reference architecture, and delivery-at-scale.


***In this role you will play a key role in:***
* Lead and grow the Integration Subpractice in Sweden, in close collaboration with the Head of Integrations & APIs, ensuring strategic alignment and coordinated development of the subpractice.
* Acting as an ambassador and market maker for Integration and API driven solutions.
* Driving pipeline growth through proactive pre-sales activities and bid work.
* Providing client facing advisory support and leading delivery engagements.


**Your profile**
* Proven leadership experience as a people manager, ideally including manager-of-managers responsibility (leading team managers).
* Track record of building high-performing teams through coaching, development planning, recruitment support, and stakeholder management across sites.
* Experience or strong interest in applying agentic AI concepts within modern integration landscapes. Understanding how Agentic AI enhances integration platforms by enabling autonomous orchestration, intelligent observability, and proactive issue resolution—shaping more adaptive, scalable, and resilient integration landscapes.
* Extensive hands-on experience in integration architecture & solution design across hybrid environments (cloud + SaaS + on-prem).
* Strong experience with hyperscalers: Azure, AWS and/or GCP (integration services, patterns, security, governance) and SaaS/iPaaS integration platforms such as Boomi, MuleSoft, Workato. Certifications in any of these are beneficial.
* Experience with open-source integration variants is highly valued.
* IBM integration platform knowledge is a plus.
* Ability to align and collaborate across business lines and internal ecosystems, strong stakeholder management.
* Excellent communication in English; Swedish is highly valuable for many local client engagements.
* Relevant degree or equivalent experience.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* You will get the opportunity to lead and shape our national integration subpractice.
* Work with leading clients and build a strong integration community with partners and hyperscalers.
* You will combine leadership with meaningful involvement in client engagements, ensuring you stay close to architecture, technology, and real-world value creation.
* Collaborate directly with leading hyperscalers and technology partners, co‑create solutions, and shape the next generation of integration capabilities.


**Application**
*We look forward to receiving your application and will review candidates on an ongoing basis. As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real | www.capgemini.com**

title: Senior Cyber Security Consultant
description:
Join Polar Point and help shape cybersecurity that makes a real difference
   

  

 At Polar Point, you will not be one consultant among many. You will join a growing cybersecurity company where senior expertise, trust and customer impact are at the center of everything we do.
   

  

 We work closely with CISOs, IT leaders and security teams to help organizations strengthen resilience, reduce risk and gain better control of their digital environments. Our work combines strategic advisory, hands-on implementation and long-term customer relationships.
   

  

 As a Senior Cyber Security Consultant, you will have the opportunity to influence both our customers’ security journeys and Polar Point’s continued growth. You will work in meaningful assignments, contribute to our service offerings and help build a company where technical excellence, clarity and responsibility matter.
   

  

**About Polar Point**
 Polar Point AB is a Stockholm-based cybersecurity consultancy helping Nordic organizations navigate complexity with clarity. We provide senior expertise, advisory services and practical security solutions that enable customers to manage cyber risk confidently while staying focused on their business.
   

  

 Our core areas include identity and access management, endpoint security, vulnerability management, security platform implementation, compliance support, security health checks, AI security and project-based cybersecurity delivery.
   

  

 We are independent, pragmatic and outcome-focused. Our ambition is to be a trusted cybersecurity partner for organizations that need senior guidance, hands-on expertise and clear progress in complex environments.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Cyber Security Consultant at Polar Point, you will play a key role in delivering high-value cybersecurity services to our customers while contributing to the growth and development of our consulting practice.
   

  

 You will combine deep technical understanding with advisory capability and business awareness. In practice, this means that you can move comfortably between strategic discussions with customer leadership, solution design with technical teams and hands-on delivery in complex customer environments.
   

  

 You will act as a trusted advisor, lead important security initiatives and help customers prioritise improvements that reduce risk and strengthen operational maturity. You will also contribute to business development in a consultative way by identifying customer needs, shaping new engagements and helping develop services that create measurable value.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

 Customer delivery and technical leadership
   

  

* Lead and deliver cybersecurity consulting engagements in complex customer environments.
* Design, implement and improve security solutions across endpoint security, vulnerability management, identity, cloud and hybrid environments.
* Perform security assessments and translate findings into pragmatic, risk-based recommendations.
* Provide senior technical guidance during implementations, security transformations and improvement programmes.
* Help customers strengthen cybersecurity hygiene, visibility, control and operational resilience.
* Support customers in aligning security improvements with business priorities, regulatory expectations and practical implementation constraints.


 Advisory and project leadership
   

  

* Act as a trusted advisor to CISOs, IT leaders and other senior stakeholders.
* Lead security projects and initiatives from planning and scoping through execution and follow-up.
* Coordinate stakeholders, manage scope, timelines, risks and dependencies.
* Support customer decision-making by explaining complex security topics in a clear and business-relevant way.
* Contribute to structured methods, playbooks, assessments and best practices used across Polar Point engagements.


 Business development and practice growth
   

  

* Identify customer needs and opportunities within existing and new engagements.
* Support pre-sales activities such as customer meetings, solution design, scoping and effort estimation.
* Contribute to proposals, presentations and service development.
* Help shape and improve Polar Point’s cybersecurity offerings.
* Share knowledge internally and support colleagues as we grow the consulting team.
* Contribute to long-term customer relationships by delivering quality, clarity and trust in every assignment.


 Who you are
   

  

 You are an experienced cybersecurity professional who enjoys combining technical depth with advisory work. You are confident in customer-facing situations and comfortable working with both technical specialists and senior decision-makers.
   

  

 You probably enjoy solving complex problems, creating structure in uncertain situations and helping customers move from analysis to practical improvement. You take ownership, communicate clearly and care about delivering outcomes that matter.
   

  

**You Will Likely Thrive At Polar Point If You**
* want to be part of a growing specialist consultancy rather than a large anonymous organisation
* enjoy having influence over both customer delivery and company development
* are comfortable taking senior responsibility in customer engagements
* value trust, transparency and long-term relationships
* like working close to experienced colleagues, founders and decision-makers
* want to combine strategic advisory with hands-on cybersecurity delivery


 We believe you have
   

  

* Approximately 10 years or more of experience in cybersecurity, security consulting or senior security delivery roles.
* Strong experience delivering cybersecurity improvements in customer or enterprise environments.
* Solid knowledge in one or more of the following areas: endpoint security, vulnerability management, identity and access management, cloud security, Microsoft security services, Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID or security platform implementation.
* Experience leading or contributing to security projects, implementations or improvement programmes.
* Ability to translate technical findings into business-relevant recommendations.
* Experience working with senior stakeholders such as CISOs, CIOs, IT leaders or security managers.
* A consultative mindset and the ability to identify customer needs, shape solutions and contribute to business development.
* Strong communication skills in both Swedish and English.
* Fluency in Swedish, written and spoken.
* Ability to obtain and maintain security clearance when required.


 It is a plus if you also have
   

  

* Experience from large, complex or regulated organizations.
* Experience with security assessments, security health checks, Zero Trust initiatives or cyber maturity improvement.
* Experience with technologies and platforms such as Microsoft 365 Security, Microsoft Entra ID, Active Directory, Tanium, Trend Vision One, BeyondTrust, Rapid7 or similar tools.
* Experience in IAM, PAM, endpoint management, EDR/XDR, vulnerability management, compliance or security operations.
* Experience working with frameworks or regulations such as ISO 27001, NIS2, NIST CSF, DORA or similar.
* Relevant certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CCSP, Microsoft security certifications or vendor-specific certifications.


 Certifications are valuable, but practical experience, sound judgement and proven customer impact matter most to us.
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

 At Polar Point, you will join a senior and entrepreneurial team with high ambitions and low prestige. We offer an environment where you can make a visible impact from day one - both for our customers and for the company we are building.
   

  

**We Offer**
* senior and meaningful cybersecurity assignments with real customer impact
* close collaboration with experienced consultants, founders and company leadership
* the opportunity to shape our services, methods and ways of working
* a trust-based culture with high responsibility and flexibility
* strong focus on quality, clarity and long-term customer relationships
* room to grow professionally as Polar Point grows
* access to a wider specialist network through our partner ecosystem and alliance relationships
* the chance to help build a cybersecurity consultancy with a clear Nordic identity and strong ambitions


 Location and working model
   

  

 The role is based in Stockholm, with flexibility depending on assignment and customer needs. Some work will be performed remotely, while customer presence is expected when it creates value or is required for delivery.
   

  

 Because many of our customers operate in Swedish-speaking environments, fluent Swedish is required.
   

  

 Apply
   

  

 If you want to help build a trusted cybersecurity consultancy with senior colleagues, meaningful assignments and real influence, we would like to hear from you.
   

  

 At Polar Point, you will help customers strengthen security where it matters most - from users and identities to devices, platforms and business-critical environments.
   

  

 We help organisations navigate complexity with clarity. Our cybersecurity solutions are built on trust, transparency and technical excellence. Let us manage the risks, so you can focus on growth.

title: Software Architect - Mobile
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Mobile Software Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will take the lead in designing scalable and performant mobile architecture for our suite of applications - primarily focused on iOS, with cross-functional knowledge of Android development considered a plus.
   

  

 You will collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to craft elegant and efficient solutions that support millions of users globally. This is a strategic and technical leadership role where your decisions will influence the long-term evolution of our mobile ecosystem.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and lead the mobile architecture strategy, ensuring a scalable and maintainable foundation across projects.
* Focus primarily on iOS architecture, libraries, and platform-specific patterns, while maintaining an understanding of Android frameworks.
* Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to ensure architectural decisions align with product goals and user experience.
* Establish and enforce coding standards, design patterns, and performance guidelines.
* Lead architectural reviews and provide guidance on refactoring and scaling existing mobile applications.
* Design APIs, SDKs, and modular components that can be reused across teams.
* Guide decisions around third-party libraries, mobile tooling, and build/deployment pipelines.
* Partner with backend and cloud teams to ensure seamless integration between mobile apps and services.
* Stay current with the latest trends and best practices in mobile architecture, performance, and security.
* Mentor mobile engineers and help elevate the team’s technical proficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in mobile development with a strong architectural mindset.
* Deep expertise in iOS development using Swift (Objective-C knowledge is a plus).
* Solid understanding of UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, and other modern iOS frameworks.
* Experience with app performance optimization, modularization, and offline-first strategies.
* Familiarity with Android development (Kotlin/Java) is a strong plus.
* Experience integrating with APIs, handling mobile data storage, caching, and background tasks.
* Strong knowledge of App Store submission, mobile security, and compliance guidelines.
* Experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and deployment automation.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain architectural concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
* Passion for clean code, design patterns (MVVM, VIPER, etc.), and scalable architecture.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Registratorer till framtida uppdrag inom offentlig sektor
description:
Nu söker vi på Adecco registratorer för konsultuppdrag hos kunder inom offentlig sektor i Stockholm. Uppdraget är en del av Adeccos pågående leveranser av kontorstjänster till offentlig sektor.
   

  

 I rollen som registrator kan arbetsuppgifterna variera beroende på uppdrag och verksamhet. Generellt arbetar du med hantering av allmänna handlingar i enlighet med gällande lagstiftning och myndighetens interna rutiner. Arbetsuppgifterna kan omfatta diarieföring, registrering och utlämnande av handlingar, posthantering samt administrativt stöd till verksamheten. Arbetet sker i en miljö med höga krav på struktur, noggrannhet och sekretess.
   

  

**Adecco är ramavtalsleverantör av kontorstjänster inom offentlig sektor** 
 och tillsätter därför löpande konsulter till uppdrag inom kommuner, regioner och statliga myndigheter. Uppdragets omfattning kan vara heltid eller deltid och genomförs inom ramen för konsultverksamhet. För rätt person finns goda möjligheter att arbeta i en samhällsviktig organisation där struktur, service och ansvar är centrala delar av vardagen.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Diplomerad registrator, registratorsutbildning på högskolenivå eller likvärdig utbildning. Alternativt, gymnasium eller likvärdig utbildning samt ett (1) års arbetslivserfarenhet som registrator
* Goda kunskaper i MS Office eller likvärdigt
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med diarieföring i dokument- och ärendehanteringssystem (exempelvis Public360, W3D3, Platina m.fl.)
* Kännedom om lagar och förordningar som styr offentlig verksamhet och registrators verksamhet och ansvar
* Kan kommunicera obehindrat på svenska, såväl i tal som i skrift.


**Meriterande:**
* Har tidigare erfarenhet av att arbeta inom offentlig sektor


**Låter det intressant?**
 Skicka in din intresseanmälan redan idag – så hjälper vi dig att hitta nästa steg i din karriär inom offentlig sektor. Observera att vi genom denna annons söker kandidater för framtida uppdrag.
   

  

**Om Adecco**
 Adecco är en del av det globala företaget Adecco Group – en av världens ledande aktörer inom HR-lösningar och ett av de största rekryterings- och bemanningsföretagen internationellt. I Sverige är Adecco en etablerad aktör inom både privat och offentlig sektor och har ramavtal med svenska myndigheter runt om i landet. Det innebär att vi regelbundet förser kommuner, regioner och statliga verksamheter med kvalificerad personal inom olika kompetensområden
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter**
 Har du frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen är du varmt välkommen att Adecco Career Center via post: accsverige@adecco.se
   

  

 Med hänsyn till semesterperioder ber vi dig att ha förståelse för att vi besvarar inkommande mejl i mån av tid och i den ordning de mottas.
   

  

 Har du frågor angående registrering, var god kontakta supporten via info@adecco.se
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Senior SAP Solution Architect
description:
**Vi på NTT DATA Business Solutions utformar nu framtidens AI-drivna implementationsprojekt som skall leverera nästa generation av ERP-lösningar till våra kunder.** 
 I den här omställningen söker vi dig som vill vara en del av detta i rollen som
 **senior lösningsarkitekt** 
**med fokus på SAP ERP** 
 med hela Norden som verkansområde.
   

  

**Om oss**
 NTT DATA Business Solutions är en global SAP Platinum Partner med över 20 000 SAP-experter världen över, varav 650 medarbetare i Norden med fokus på SAP. Som en del av NTT DATA-koncernen med 200 000 medarbetare hjälper vi kunder att skapa affärsvärde genom innovation, teknik och långsiktiga partnerskap.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Ditt fokus blir att leda våra kunder genom sina transformationsprojekt och driva
 **utformningen av deras lösningar** 
 med framtidens ERP som plattform.
   

  

 Du är en nyckelperson för kunden under
 **hela processen** 
 från inledande säljaktiviteter till projektgenomförande och efterföljande utvecklingsfaser. I rollen som senior ERP-arkitekt är du kundens rådgivare där du ofta har direktkontakt med nyckelpersoner hos kundens ledningsfunktioner.
   

  

 I leveransen arbetar du nära både
 **seniora och juniora kollegor** 
 från hela Norden där du driver designarbetet. Du kommer även ha ett nära samarbete med våra
 **europeiska kollegor från vår globala organisation** 
 .
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Ansvarsområden**
* Leda lösningsarkitektur med utgångspunkt i SAP ERP.
* Facilitera workshops och strategiska kunddialoger.
* Säkerställa kvalitet, skalbarhet och affärsvärde i levererade lösningar.
* Bidra till presales, affärsutveckling och kompetensutveckling inom SAP-området.
* Leda seniora och juniora kollegor i utvecklingen av kundens lösningar.
* Vara med och utveckla framtidens AI-drivna implementationsprocess.


**Vi söker dig som har**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet som lösningsarkitekt inom SAP ERP och affärstransformation.
* Erfarenhet av större SAP ERP-implementeringar och transformationsprojekt.
* Djup kompetens inom SAP S/4HANA, migreringar, konverteringar och uppgraderingar.
* Erfarenhet från flera Supply Chain-områden såsom MM, SD, PP, EWM eller IBP.
* Förmåga att omsätta affärsbehov till hållbara lösningsdesigner.
* Starka ledarskaps-, kommunikations- och rådgivningsförmågor.


 Meriterande är erfarenhet av SAP BTP, Business AI, Joule, Business Data Cloud, integrationsarkitektur och Enterprise Architecture.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi?**
* Spännande transformationsprojekt inom SAP ERP.
* Samarbete med SAP-experter och arkitekter världen över.
* Arbeta med de senaste SAP-innovationerna.
* Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter i en global organisation.
* Flexibel arbetsmiljö med fokus på balans mellan arbete och privatliv.
* Konkurrenskraftiga villkor och attraktiva förmåner.


**Ansök idag**
 Vill du vara med och skapa framtidens intelligenta företag tillsammans med oss? Då ser vi fram emot din ansökan.
   

  

 At NTT DATA Business Solutions, we drive innovation – from advisory and implementation to managed services and beyond, powered by a global team of over 18,500 experts representing over 90 nations in more than 30 countries. With SAP at our core and a powerful ecosystem of partners like Microsoft and ServiceNow, we continuously improve solutions and AI-driven technology to make them work for companies – and for their people.
   

  

 We are part of NTT DATA, a $30+ billion business and technology services, AI and digital infrastructure leader. As a Global Top Employer, NTT DATA serves 75% of the Fortune Global 100 and, with experts in over 70 countries, co-innovates solutions that encourage experimentation and recognize great work.
   

  

 With us, you have endless opportunities to think big, act bold and take ownership. Make this the place where you belong, learn, and build your network. Make this the place where you grow.

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: SAP Business Analytics Lead Consultant
description:
**Är du SAP Business Analytics-konsult med önskan att utvecklas som team lead?**
**Välkommen till oss på NTT DATA - en av världens ledande SAP Partners.**
**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som vill arbeta i skärningspunkten mellan teknik och verksamhet som SAP Analytics Lead hos oss. Utifrån ett intresse för teknik ska du trivas med att arbeta med människor, olika branscher och olika tekniska plattformar. Du har arbetat som senior konsult och utvecklare på SAP-analyslösningar i minimum 7 år och kan bidra i hela processen; från analys av befintliga lösningar, till implementering och efterföljande vidareutveckling av de implementerade lösningarna och önskar arbeta på våra projekt med Datasphere och Business Data Cloud.
   

  

 Erfarenhet och/eller kunskap om rapportering ovanpå SAP ERP är meriterande och du bör ha god erfarenhet av SAP’s rapporteringsportfölj. Du har en passion för att hjälpa dina kunder att få ut det bästa av sina analyslösningar och du kan se helheten i de lösningar som kunden har och vill ha, även om de ofta baseras på stora och komplexa SAP ERP-lösningar.
   

  

 Vår arbetskultur präglas av förtroende, entusiasm och laganda. Vi är övertygade om att en sund arbetslivsbalans är avgörande, och ditt välbefinnande är vår prioritet. Vi kan erbjuda en konkurrenskraftig lön, bonusar och förmåner som kompensation för din kompetens och erfarenhet.
   

  

**Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av de flesta av nedanstående punkter:**
* Teknisk analys, arkitektur och konsultverksamhet: minimum 7 års arbetserfarenhet som senior SAP-konsult.
* Meriterande med erfarenhet från försäljningsarbete (pre-sales)
* Trivs med leveransansvar i projekt
* Erfarenhet av SAP:s analysportfölj såsom:
* SAP BW på HANA / SAP BW/4 HANA
* SAP Bex Query Designer / BWMT
* SAP Design Studio / Designer
* SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
* SAP HANA-utveckling (HANA Views)
* SAP CDS-teknik
* Datasphere
* Data warehouse-teknologier, ETL och datamodellering
* Snowflake
* Power BI
* Azure Analytics


**Personliga egenskaper som vi värdesätter, och hoppas att Du har:**
* Social och utåtriktad med intresse att utvecklas som ledare
* God kommunikationsförmåga
* Strukturerad
* Tar initiativ och ansvar med stort engagemang
* Intresse för både teknik och affärsprocesser
* Stor förmåga till självinlärning och inhämtning av ny kunskap
* Lagspelare av rang - som gärna delar med dig av din kompetens


**Vad Vi Erbjuder Dig**
* Möjlighet att arbeta med de största SAP-kunderna/implementeringarna i Sverige och Norden
* Möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken inom SAP Business Analytics, tillsammans med de andra bästa analyslösningarna som Azure Analytics och Snowflake
* Det största, mest kompetenta och snabbast växande SAP Business Analytics-teamet i Norden, som också har gedigen expertis utöver SAP Business Analytics
* En flexibel arbetsdag med fokus på en bra balans mellan arbete och fritid
* En informell organisation, med platt struktur och lagom högt i tak
* Fokus på professionell utveckling, kompetensutveckling och goda möjligheter till internationella karriärmöjligheter
* Sociala aktiviteter, kickoff events mm.
* En organisation med konkurrenskraftiga villkor


**Om NTT DATA Business Solutions och Analytics**
 NTT DATA Business Solutions är ett internationellt framåtblickande IT-företag och en av världens ledande SAP Partners. Vi levererar allt från rådgivning till implementering av SAP-lösningar inklusive efterföljande drift och support. NTT DATA Business Solutions har mer än 15 000 högkvalificerade SAP-anställda i nästan 30 länder, fördelade på 5 regioner. I Norden har vi idag 500+ anställda.
   

  

 Vi ser ett starkt växande behov på marknaden, där våra kunder efterfrågar råd och assistans inför sin digitala transformationsresa, till exempel inom Data Platform, Molnlösningar och Big Data. Vårt huvudfokus har traditionellt sett varit kopplat till SAP och deras Business Analytics-portfölj, men de senaste åren har vi även fokuserat starkt på andra rapporteringsplattformar, som Azure Analytics/PowerBI och Snowflake. En av NTT DATA Business Solutions största styrkor är kombinationen av djupgående SAP- och Analytics-expertis. Detta gör att vi kan ge våra kunder goda råd och rätt vägledning vid val av rapporteringslösning, och tillhandahålla kompletta team och assistera våra kunder genom hela implementeringsfasen.
   

  

 Vi välkomnar sökande som kan kommunicera flytande på ”skandinaviska” och som kan samarbeta effektivt med våra nordiska kollegor.
   

  

 Vi är en sann "glokal" organisation, med vilket vi menar att vi har det bästa av två världar; en stor internationell aktör som ägare som ger dig många karriär- och affärsmöjligheter samtidigt som vi har en fantastisk arbetsmiljö med många sociala aktiviteter lokalt. Hos oss är laganda en ryggradsreflex.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 At NTT DATA Business Solutions, we drive innovation – from advisory and implementation to managed services and beyond, powered by a global team of over 18,500 experts representing over 90 nations in more than 30 countries. With SAP at our core and a powerful ecosystem of partners like Microsoft and ServiceNow, we continuously improve solutions and AI-driven technology to make them work for companies – and for their people.
   

  

 We are part of NTT DATA, a $30+ billion business and technology services, AI and digital infrastructure leader. As a Global Top Employer, NTT DATA serves 75% of the Fortune Global 100 and, with experts in over 70 countries, co-innovates solutions that encourage experimentation and recognize great work.
   

  

 With us, you have endless opportunities to think big, act bold and take ownership. Make this the place where you belong, learn, and build your network. Make this the place where you grow.

title: Finance Business Solutions Lead - OneStream Vertical Profitability
description:
Autoliv's primary goal is to Save More Lives. Our products never get a second chance. This is why we can never compromise on quality. We are working to increase vehicle safety by developing seatbelts, airbags and steering wheels and you can be part of our team as
 **Finance Business Solutions Lead - OneStream Vertical Profitability** 
 .
   

  

 In this role you will be responsible for Autoliv’s global profitability solutions in OneStream, spanning both Actuals and Forecast processes. The role serves as the central link between business stakeholders, data strategy, and technical teams, driving solution enhancements while ensuring stable and effective operational delivery.
   

  

 This role works at the intersections of both operational and financial data models, supporting that these are consistently aligned with business requirements, enabling accurate and insightful profitability analysis.
   

  

 With OneStream as the core global platform, the role supports end-to-end profitability reporting while contributing to the advancement of finance transformation and standardization initiatives.
   

  

 Should you be interested in overseeing these
 **tasks** 
 and aiming for enhanced performance standards, your role will involve
 **:**
* Lead Autoliv’s OneStream Vertical Profitability Solution Lead (incl. AC VP, Market & BOM)
* Act as a bridge between stakeholders, incl. Group, Divisional and Functions (e.g. Sales, Operations, SCM)
* Ensure smooth day-to-day business
* Ensure data integrity and governance
* Maintain documentation, training materials, and user guidance
* Long-term roadmap planning
* Drive continuous improvements and simplification
* Lead change management and enhancements including impact assessments.


**If You Have/are**
* Strong understanding of operational data models (MRP experience), preferably experience in finance controlling also having worked in the details (xP&A, vertical profitability, reporting)
* Fluent in English
* Solid knowledge of end-to-end profitability reporting
* Has been part of finance transformation and standardization initiatives
* Strong with Data - SQL experience & understanding of relational data models Understands a finance IT landscape, e.g. ERP -> Snowflake -> EPM landscape OneStream or other Multidimensional Cube experience (e.g., Anaplan, Oracle EPM Cloud, SAP Analytics Cloud Planning, OneStream)


**We will be more than glad to chat with you about your experience and your career goals.**
 In our international work setting, you will find a range of opportunities that are designed to enhance your career and personal development. Including new and different perspectives is part of what ensures the team’s success. We are committed to develop people’s skills, knowledge and creative potential. Our training and development programs emphasize technical competency, leadership development and business management skill.
   

  

**More lives saved – more life lived!**

title: Senior Rust Developer
description:
**Do you want to build high-performance software for the future of live media production?**
 At Appear, we develop technology used to power some of the world’s largest broadcasters, sports leagues, and media companies. We are now looking to hire two Senior Software Engineers to strengthen our Dynamite team in Stockholm. In this role, you will design and build performance-critical systems where low latency, reliability, and real-time processing are essential.
   

  

 This role is focused on developing a new suite of live production applications, including Multiviewer and other production tools used in broadcast environments. These systems allow production teams to monitor, control, and produce live content in flexible and modern ways.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with colleagues across our engineering teams in Stockholm, Oslo, and the UK, contributing to solutions used in some of the most demanding live media environments in the world.
   

  

**What You Will Work On**
* Designing and developing native and containerised dynamic media processing software solutions.
* Building components for real-time live production systems
* Contributing to the development of Multiviewer and future production tools
* Working on systems where low latency, reliability and performance are critical
* Helping shape the architecture of Appear’s software-defined production platform


**Further Responsibilities**
* Write, test and maintain high quality code following best practices and coding standards
* Debug, troubleshoot and optimise complex systems to ensure stability and performance
* Collaborate closely with QA, Product, Support and other Development teams to deliver integrated solutions
* Share knowledge within the team and support the development of other engineers
* Stay current with relevant technologies and industry developments to continuously improve our solutions


**What You Bring To The Team**
 We are looking for engineers who enjoy solving complex technical problems and building robust, high-quality systems.
   

  

**Is this you?**
* Experienced with low-level systems programming, such as Rust, C++ or C
* Experience developing high-performance applications, for example within graphics programming, network communication, compression algorithms or similar performance-critical systems
* Curious and analytical mindset with a passion for solving complex technical problems
* Self-motivated and able to manage changing priorities working with global customers


**Nice to have**
* Background in media processing, networking or broadcast domain
* Familiarity with distributed systems, cloud or SaaS environments
* Building applications for containerised environments such as Kubernetes
* Exposure to high-performance networking, for example RDMA (e.g. libfabric)
* Developing production-grade systems with strong focus on robustness and security


**Why Appear?**
* Be part of a growing global company, experiencing cross-cultural collaboration in a diverse and dynamic work environment. We have over 30 different nationalities at our company today!
* Hybrid working policy & flexible work hours to accommodate your work-life balance
* 30 days of annual vacation
* Complimentary breakfast served daily at the office
* Be part of a growing team with regular social catch-ups, informal after-works, and company-wide events
* Regular visits to our Oslo HQ to stay connected with the wider Appear team
* Full salary during parental leave
* Group life insurance (TGL), occupational accident insurance (TFA), medical insurance (“sjukförsäkring” & “premiebefrielse”) and health care insurance (“sjukvårdsförsäkring”)
* Occupational Pension Insurance matching the ITP1 scheme
* Travel insurance coverage


**Practical information**
* Location: Centrally located Stockholm office
* Language: Excellent spoken and written English


**Please note:** 
*Due to summer vacation, most of our hiring teams will be away in July. Recruitment activities for this role will resume in August. Your application remains important to us, and we will update you on your status as soon as the process is back underway. Thank you for your understanding and patience during this time.*
**Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, Appear is a leader in live production technology, specialising in high-capacity, sustainable solutions for media processing and content delivery. Our portfolio is designed to support the most complex scenarios of live event contribution, adapting seamlessly to the ever-evolving dynamics of the media, entertainment, and sports industries.**
**Over the past 20 years, Appear’s world-renowned team of experts made us the most progressive and forward-thinking company in the industry. Our relentless emphasis on modularity and functional versatility places us at the forefront of driving innovation in live production technology.**
**We proudly count the world’s leading content creators amongst our esteemed list of customers who trust our solutions to deliver the highest profile live media with integrity and efficiency.
   

  

 Appear’s global operation includes centres of excellence in Oslo, Sweden, Southampton, Singapore and Los Angeles.**

title: Testingenjör
description:
### **Job description**


För vår kund söker vi efter en erfaren **Testingenjör.**


I rollen kommer du att vara en central del i utveckling och fungera som teknisk expert inom verifiering och validering. Du driver och säkerställer att Verifiering & Validering -aktiviteter genomförs effektivt, strukturerat på sub system eller system och med hög kvalitet.


Ansvarsområde:


* Granska krav och risker proaktivt samt bidra med rekommendationer kring verifierings- och mätmetoder.
* Bidra till utveckling, granskning och uppföljning av V&V-planer.
* Ta fram faktabaserade rekommendationer och beslutsunderlag genom analyser, rapporter och tekniska forum.
* Agera teknisk referens och ansvarig för testutrustning, testmiljöer och konfigurering, inklusive arbetsmiljö- och säkerhetsaspekter (OHS).
* Säkerställa att verifierings- och valideringsaktiviteter genomförs enligt testspecifikationer, processer och kvalitetskrav.
* Fungera som närmaste kundrepresentant i utvecklingsarbetet och säkerställa att kundperspektivet beaktas genom hela utvecklingscykeln.
* Samarbeta nära utvecklings-, system-, projekt- och produktteam för att säkerställa rätt kvalitet vid rätt tidpunkt.
* Proaktivt säkerställa maskiners status såsom konfiguration, underhåll.

### **Basic qualifications**


* Flera års erfarenhet av Verification & Validation, testning eller kvalitetssäkring inom produktutveckling.
* Mycket god förståelse för kravhantering, riskanalys och testmetodik.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med maskiner i testmiljöer och tekniska verifieringsaktiviteter.
* Förmåga att analysera data, dra slutsatser och kommunicera tydliga, faktabaserade rekommendationer.
* Ett strukturerat arbetssätt och god samarbetsförmåga.
* God kommunikativ förmåga och vana att samarbeta med både tekniska specialister och verksamhetsrepresentanter.

### **Preferred additional skills, personal traits and experience**


För att passa denna roll tror vi att du är analytisk, kvalitetsmedveten och prestigelös. Du tar initiativ, vågar utmana befintliga lösningar och har förmågan att representera både tekniska och kundrelaterade perspektiv i utvecklingsarbetet.


### **We offer**


Beroende på erfarenhetsgrad erbjuder vi dels anställning hos oss på Sigma Industry South eller Hyrrekrytering där kunden eventuellt tar över anställningen efter en tid.


Som konsult hos oss får du arbeta tillsammans med de främsta utvecklingsintensiva företagen inom svensk industri. Uppdragen anpassas alltid i möjligaste mån, för att nivån ska bli så utvecklande och stimulerande som möjligt. Omkring dig kommer du ha många duktiga kollegor och ett aktivt erfarenhetsutbyte. Vår företagskultur präglas av entreprenörskap och korta beslutsvägar. Gemenskap, engagemang och glädje är viktiga element som vi anser skapar trivsel.


*Sigma Industry South AB är ett dynamiskt teknikkonsultföretag inom produkt- och produktionsutveckling som utmanar de etablerade standarderna.*


*Kombinationen av lång branscherfarenhet, stort engagemang, interna och externa uppdrag samt ett tätt samarbete mellan Sigmas olika verksamheter i regionen skapar ett unikt branschöverskridande växthus för ingenjörer. Med mångfald, delaktighet och entreprenörskap stärker och utvecklar vi vår verksamhet och våra medarbetare. Skulle du vilja utvecklas i denna miljö?*


#LI-AH


#LI-SISO


### **More information**


Andreas Holmgren


andreas.holmgren@sigma.se

Logistics, Electricity & Automation, Energy & Power Engineering, Hardware Electronics, Testing and Verification, Project Management & Management, Life Science, QA & Validation, PLM, Audio/Acoustics, Opto engineering, Project Management, Software development embedded systems, RF And Microwave, Function development, System design, Business Intelligence, Business Systems, System development, Operation, support and infrastructure, Test & Quality, Business Analysis, Digital Communication, Requirement Management & Business Development, Other, Project Management, Software, Client Tools & Skills, Generic, Field of Experience, Role Experience, Product, Product Information, Software development, Digitalisation, Digitalisation, Automation, Administration, Finance, HR, Management, Sales and Marketing, Sustainability
